task_completion.description: Verify that a distance measurement markup is placed on the MRI, connecting the edge of the tumor to the nearest wall of the lateral ventricle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line or ruler tool visible in the medical imaging software (e.g., 3D Slicer) showing a measurement between the tumor and the ventricle.

task_completion.description: Verify that the measurement markup is saved to ~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/ventricle_distance.mrk.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command, or file explorer showing the creation of 'ventricle_distance.mrk.json' in the specified directory, or a text editor showing its coordinate contents.

task_completion.description: Verify that the proximity_report.json file is created with all required fields: minimum_distance_mm, classification, nearest_ventricle_component, and ventricular_invasion_suspected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the contents of 'proximity_report.json' containing the four exact required JSON keys.

task_completion.description: Verify that the nearest_ventricle_component field in the report is populated with a specific anatomical part of the ventricle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'nearest_ventricle_component' key in the JSON report has a string value (e.g., 'frontal horn', 'body', 'atrium').

task_completion.description: Verify that the ventricular_invasion_suspected field in the report is populated with an assessment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ventricular_invasion_suspected' key in the JSON report has a boolean (true/false) or clear yes/no value.

task_completion.description: Verify that the classification field in the report is populated with a spatial relationship category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'classification' key in the JSON report has a descriptive string value indicating the spatial relationship based on the distance.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used medical imaging software to visually assess and measure the MRI, rather than guessing values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the MRI loaded in a GUI application (like 3D Slicer) with active interaction, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the measurement markup file was generated by the imaging software and not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The software's save/export dialog is used, or the resulting .mrk.json file contains complex, software-generated formatting and coordinate arrays.

integrity.description: Verify the reported distance matches the visual measurement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'minimum_distance_mm' value in the JSON report matches or closely aligns with the distance shown on the measurement line in the imaging software GUI.
